stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 4444, lateral separation between aircraft is provided by the use of the same navigation aid on specified tracks...

options.a: using visual observation so that aircraft are laterally separated by at least 10 NM.
options.b: so that both aircraft are established on VOR radials diverging by at least 25 degrees and at least one aircraft is at a distance of 5 NM or more from the navigation aid.
options.c: so that both aircraft are established on tracks to or from the NDB which are diverging by at least 15 degrees and at least one aircraft is at a distance of 10 NM or more from the facility.
options.d: which are separated by a minimum amount appropriate to the navigation aid employed.
